title: Unique Party 56115 - 12" Pearlised Latex Assorted Blue "It's A Boy" Baby Shower Balloons, Pack of 5
features: Pack of 5 Assorted Pearlised Latex Blue & White "It's A Boy" Balloons
Latex balloons measure 12" (30cm) when fully inflated (ship uninflated)
Ideal for decorating a boy baby shower or gender reveal party
Packaged balloons may vary in colour or shade from inflated balloons
Combine with other baby shower supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Create a charming party scene to welcome the new arrival with these Pearlised Latex Blue Baby Shower Balloons. Featuring "It's a Boy" text and a hearts design printed all over, these blue party balloons are ideal for adding decorative bursts of shimmering colour to a boy baby shower or gender reveal party. Arrange them with foil balloons, a balloon weight and curling ribbon to create a dazzling table centrepiece or floor-standing balloon bouquet. Box Contains 1 x Pack of 5 Pearlised Latex Blue "It's A Boy" Balloons
